title: Vanilla+++ (Limoute Gang)
description: Light Fabric modpack enhancing the vanilla experience with optimizations, visual tweaks, and small quality-of-life improvements. Designed for the Limoute Gang server.
body:
Vanilla+++ is a lightweight Fabric modpack made for the Limoute server.
It keeps the vanilla gameplay intact while improving visuals, performance, and comfort.
You’ll find optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and Starlight, as well as small QoL features such as FallingTree, Mouse Tweaks, and AppleSkin.

Some small touches enhance immersion, such as “There’s Always a Bigger Fish” — fishing now has rarities, sizes, and special baits. AlcoCraft+ just for some fun brewing some beers in a little wooden mansion.

Vanilla+++ aims to feel familiar but smoother and cleaner, perfect for long-term multiplayer adventures.

Main features:

- Performance: Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Starlight

- Gameplay tweaks: FallingTree, Double Doors, There’s Always a Bigger Fish

- Exploration: Towns and Towers, JourneyMap, Tectonic

- Visuals & shaders: Iris, Complementary Shaders, Faithful 32x/3D

- Utilities: Essential Commands, LuckPerms, Simple Voice Chat

The modpack evolves along with the server — expect frequent updates as the Limoute world grows.
